info.name: News API Collection
info.description: API collection for retrieving news data from the Laravel backend.

query.description: Optional: Number of items per page (default 10)

request.description: Retrieves a list of published news ordered by published date descending. Supports pagination with per_page parameter (default 10).

response.name: Success Response

request.description: Retrieves a single published news by its slug.

response.name: Success Response
